remember: Students will be able to define money and its functions.
Students will be able to explain the characteristics of money.
Students will be able to explain the evolution of money.
understand: Students will be able to understand the role of money in the economy.
Students will be able to explain the relationship between money and inflation.
Students will be able to understand the functions of commercial banks.
apply: Students will be able to calculate the money supply in an economy.
Students will be able to explain the impact of monetary policy on the economy.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of central banks in a modern economy.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the effects of inflation on the economy.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of changes in money supply on economic activity.
Students will be able to compare the functions of different types of banks.

ncert_objectives: Explain the functions of money in an economy.
Describe the evolution of money from commodity to fiat money.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the role of central banks in a modern economy.
Discuss the impact of monetary policy on the economy.
